settings.custom_liquid: THE LEGACY COLLECTION.

<style>
  /* ── Fade from video into description ── */
  #shopify-section-banner {
    position: relative;
  }
  #shopify-section-banner::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 80px;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0a0a0a 0%, transparent 100%);
    z-index: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Hide duplicate title — already shown on video */
  .collection-hero__title {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* Dark editorial background */
  .collection-hero {
    background: #0d0d0d !important;
    padding: 64px 0 72px !important;
  }

  /* Split layout: label column + description column */
  .collection-hero__text-wrapper {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr !important;
    gap: 64px !important;
    align-items: start !important;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* Inject label via ::before on text wrapper */
  .collection-hero__text-wrapper::before {
    content: 'THE COLLECTION';
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    padding-top: 4px;
    display: block;
    grid-column: 1;
  }

  /* Description text */
  .collection-hero__description {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    font-weight: 300 !important;
    line-height: 1.85 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6) !important;
    grid-column: 2;
  }

  .collection-hero__description p {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6) !important;
    margin-bottom: 16px !important;
  }

  .collection-hero__description strong {
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85) !important;
  }

  /* Pull-quote the last line */
  .collection-hero__description p:last-child {
    font-style: italic !important;
    font-size: 13px !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35) !important;
    border-left: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15) !important;
    padding-left: 16px !important;
    margin-top: 24px !important;
  }

  /* Mobile: stack */
  @media screen and (max-width: 749px) {
    .collection-hero__text-wrapper {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
      gap: 24px !important;
    }
    .collection-hero__text-wrapper::before {
      grid-column: 1;
    }
    .collection-hero__description {
      grid-column: 1 !important;
    }
  }
</style>

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer:
Our orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days.

Estimated Shipping Times:

United States & Canada: 7–12 business days

Europe: 7–12 business days

UAE & Middle East: 10–14 business days

Rest of the World: 7–12 business days

settings.question: What does the warranty include?
settings.answer: Our warranty does not cover damage caused by personal misuse or destruction, and applies only to defects resulting from manufacturing errors or material faults.

settings.question: Any question?
settings.answer: You can reach us through our contact page. We will be happy to assist you.
